name: Slim Vang Sy Baas: Musiek
overview: In each episode of this fun-filled game show, two families go head to head in a livingroom-style studio where they must duke it out through a series of music-based and enjoyable challenges. Teammates are friends, family, colleagues or even neighbors and although things may seem casual, the battle is no joke.

trailers.title: Nuut op VIA | Slim vang sy baas: musiek
